testsuite.name: 第二层 - SecurityAuditService 正则审计

testcase.name: 包含 Socket 操作的脚本应被审计拦截
null 脚本应被审计拦截
集合操作脚本应通过审计
包含反射调用的脚本应被审计拦截
超大脚本应被审计拦截
数学运算脚本应通过审计
包含 System 调用的脚本应被审计拦截
包含进程创建的脚本应被审计拦截
包含网络操作的脚本应被审计拦截
包含文件操作的脚本应被审计拦截
无限循环模式应产生警告

testsuite.system-out: 16:29:43.997 [Test worker] WARN SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-socket, error=检测到危险的网络操作模式 16:29:44.003 [Test worker] WARN SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-socket, result=REJECTED, errors=1, warnings=0 16:29:44.003 [Test worker] WARN com.example.ruleengine.engine.SecurityAuditService -- 脚本安全审计未通过: scriptId=test-socket, errors=[检测到危险的网络操作模式] 16:29:44.005 [Test worker] WARN SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-null, error=空脚本 16:29:44.006 [Test worker] INFO SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-collection, result=PASSED, warnings=0 16:29:44.006 [Test worker] INFO SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-normal, result=PASSED, warnings=0 16:29:44.007 [Test worker] WARN SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-reflection, error=检测到危险的反射操作模式 16:29:44.007 [Test worker] WARN SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-reflection, result=REJECTED, errors=1, warnings=0 16:29:44.007 [Test worker] WARN com.example.ruleengine.engine.SecurityAuditService -- 脚本安全审计未通过: scriptId=test-reflection, errors=[检测到危险的反射操作模式] 16:29:44.008 [Test worker] WARN SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-thread, error=检测到危险的线程操作模式 16:29:44.008 [Test worker] WARN SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-thread, result=REJECTED, errors=1, warnings=0 16:29:44.008 [Test worker] WARN com.example.ruleengine.engine.SecurityAuditService -- 脚本安全审计未通过: scriptId=test-thread, errors=[检测到危险的线程操作模式] 16:29:44.009 [Test worker] INFO SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-nesting, warning=嵌套深度过深, depth=15 16:29:44.009 [Test worker] INFO SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-nesting, result=PASSED, warnings=1 16:29:44.013 [Test worker] WARN SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-oversized, error=脚本超长, length=70000 16:29:44.014 [Test worker] INFO SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-math, result=PASSED, warnings=0 16:29:44.014 [Test worker] WARN SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-system, error=检测到危险的System 调用模式 16:29:44.014 [Test worker] WARN SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-system, result=REJECTED, errors=1, warnings=0 16:29:44.015 [Test worker] WARN com.example.ruleengine.engine.SecurityAuditService -- 脚本安全审计未通过: scriptId=test-system, errors=[检测到危险的System scriptId=test-process, result=REJECTED, errors=1, warnings=0 16:29:44.015 [Test worker] WARN com.example.ruleengine.engine.SecurityAuditService -- 脚本安全审计未通过: scriptId=test-process, [Test worker] WARN com.example.ruleengine.engine.SecurityAuditService -- 脚本安全审计未通过: scriptId=test-file, errors=[检测到危险的文件操作模式] 16:29:44.019 [Test worker] INFO SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-loop, warning=可能的无限循环 16:29:44.019 [Test worker] INFO SECURITY_AUDIT -- [SECURITY_AUDIT] scriptId=test-loop, result=PASSED, warnings=1 16:29:44.020 [Test worker] WARN SECURITY_AUDIT --
